items.title: SEC and NFA Announce Memorandum of Understanding to Further Harmonize Regulatory Coordination
items.raw_excerpt: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and National Futures Association (NFA) today announced that they have entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to enhance their cooperation, coordination, and information sharing in areas of common…
